seo.meta_title: Mount Rinjani 3-Day Senaru Trek — Crater Rim, Lake & Hot Spring | Go2Rinjani
seo.meta_description: Trek Mount Rinjani via Senaru in 3 days — rainforest trail to Pelawangan Senaru crater rim, descent to Segara Anak lake, and volcanic hot spring soak. No summit. Certified guides included.

hero.title: Mount Rinjani 3-Day Senaru Trek — Rainforest, Lake & Hot Spring
hero.desc: Go2Rinjani's most immersive no-summit Rinjani experience — the 3-day Senaru lake trek takes you through dense tropical rainforest to Pelawangan Senaru crater rim, down into the sacred crater to camp beside Segara Anak lake, and to the volcanic hot springs on the crater floor. All fully supported by certified local guides, porters, and permits inside Mount Rinjani National Park.

intro.label: 3 Days 2 Nights — Senaru Route
intro.title: Rinjani's Sacred Crater Lake — Through the Rainforest, No Summit Required
intro.desc: The 3-day Senaru lake trek is designed for trekkers who want to descend into the heart of Mount Rinjani National Park — the sacred Segara Anak lake at 2,008 m — without the physical demands of a summit push. Starting from the ancient Sasak village of Senaru, the trail winds through dense tropical rainforest to Pelawangan Senaru crater rim (2,641 m), then descends into the volcanic crater to camp beside Segara Anak lake and soak in its natural hot springs. A deeply immersive Rinjani experience that connects trekkers with both the mountain's natural wonders and its Sasak cultural heritage.

highlights.section_title: What to Expect on This Trek

items.title: Senaru Rainforest Trail
items.desc: The Senaru route is Rinjani's most biodiverse trail — winding through dense tropical rainforest on the western slopes of Mount Rinjani National Park, rich with native flora, birdsong, and the sounds of untouched mountain wilderness.

items.title: Pelawangan Senaru Crater Rim at 2,641 m
items.desc: Reach Pelawangan Senaru — the Senaru crater rim at 2,641 m — with sweeping views over Segara Anak lake below and the summit of Mount Rinjani rising to 3,726 m on the opposite side of the volcanic caldera.

items.title: Descent to Segara Anak Lake
items.desc: Descend from Pelawangan Senaru into Mount Rinjani's sacred volcanic crater and camp beside Segara Anak lake at 2,008 m — a turquoise crater lake revered in both Sasak and Balinese tradition as a place of deep spiritual significance.

items.title: Volcanic Hot Springs at the Crater Floor
items.desc: Soak in the natural volcanic hot springs on the shores of Segara Anak lake — a deeply restorative experience at the heart of Mount Rinjani National Park, and one of the most memorable moments of the entire Senaru trek.

items.title: Sasak Cultural Heritage
items.desc: The Senaru route passes through the ancient Sasak village of Senaru — one of Lombok's most traditional communities — and the trail itself traverses landscapes shaped by centuries of Sasak farming and spiritual connection to Mount Rinjani.

itinerary.intro: Three days, two nights on the Senaru route — rainforest, crater rim, Segara Anak lake, and volcanic hot springs without the summit push.

days.title: Senaru Village to Pelawangan Senaru Crater Rim
days.desc: After breakfast and pre-trek briefing at your accommodation in Senaru, Go2Rinjani transfers you to the Senaru trailhead at the village edge. Trek through dense tropical rainforest and three rest posts before arriving at Pelawangan Senaru crater rim (2,641 m) by late afternoon. Dinner and overnight camping at the crater rim with panoramic views over Segara Anak lake and Rinjani's caldera.
highlights: Transfer to Senaru trailhead at village edge
Trek through dense tropical rainforest — Post 1, 2, 3
Arrive Pelawangan Senaru crater rim (2,641 m)
Panoramic views over Segara Anak lake & Rinjani caldera
Dinner & overnight camp at Pelawangan Senaru

days.title: Descent to Segara Anak Lake — Hot Spring Soak
days.desc: After sunrise over Rinjani's caldera from Pelawangan Senaru, begin the descent into the volcanic crater to Segara Anak lake (2,008 m). Arrive at the sacred crater lake by midday, set up camp on the lakeside, and soak in the natural volcanic hot springs on the crater floor. Overnight camp beside Segara Anak lake.
highlights: Sunrise over Rinjani caldera from Pelawangan Senaru
Descent from Pelawangan Senaru into volcanic crater
Arrive Segara Anak lake (2,008 m) by midday
Volcanic hot spring soak at crater floor
Dinner & overnight camp beside Segara Anak lake

days.title: Segara Anak Lake — Ascent & Descent to Senaru Village
days.desc: Wake to sunrise over Segara Anak lake before beginning the ascent back to Pelawangan Senaru crater rim and the full descent through the rainforest to Senaru village. Transfer back to accommodation after completing the trek.
highlights: Ascent from Segara Anak lake to Pelawangan Senaru (2,641 m)
Full descent through rainforest to Senaru village

inclusions.intro: Every 3-day Mount Rinjani Senaru lake trek with Go2Rinjani is fully supported — here is exactly what is included.
included: Porter (personal camp equipment up to 25 kg)
Mount Rinjani National Park entrance permit
All meals on the mountain (3x daily) + hot drinks + mineral water
Full camping equipment: tent, sleeping bag, mattress, pillow, cooking gear
Hotel pickup and drop-off (Senaru, Mataram, Airport, Senggigi, Bangsal)
excluded: Personal trekking gear (jacket, trekking shoes, trekking poles, daypack)
Tips for guides and porters (appreciated but not mandatory)

details.value: April – December (dry season). Closed January – March.
